Wojciech Łuszczyński
GTM architect, product builder, AI-first operator. I design and ship growth systems connecting demand generation, sales and revenue operations into one engine, then build the software that automates and measures it. Eight years across B2B SaaS and HR Tech - from seed to scale.

SS
SabiSzop
B2C Marketplace · PWA
Opis

Aplikacja do zarządzania budżetem domowym i zakupami. Inteligentne listy z AI, skaner paragonów OCR i wykresy wydatków. PWA - bez App Store.

Funkcjonalności
  • Inteligentne listy zakupów z kategoriami
  • Porównywarka cen produktów
  • Skaner paragonów z OCR
  • Zarządzanie budżetem domowym
  • Price alerts i powiadomienia
  • PWA - instalacja bez App Store
Tech Stack
ReactSupabaseTailwind CSSTypeScriptPWANetlify
Live app
VL
VeloLodz
Civic Tech · Community / Sport
Opis

Platforma civic tech do mapowania problemów z infrastrukturą rowerową Łodzi. Użytkownicy zgłaszają niebezpieczne miejsca, głosują na priorytety napraw i śledzą postępy.

Funkcjonalności
  • Interaktywna mapa z pinami zgłoszeń
  • Zgłoszenie z GPS i zdjęciem
  • Głosowanie na priorytety napraw
  • Status: Nowe / W trakcie / Naprawione
  • Skaner infrastruktury - audyt tras
  • PWA · Offline support
Tech Stack
ReactSupabaseLeaflet.jsTailwindPWAVercel

SL
Spawarki Laserowe
B2B · SEO / Industrial
Opis

Product site for an authorised BLink fibre laser welder dealer. 3-model catalog (1500W–3000W), ROI framing built on real production benchmarks (TIG 8 min vs laser 2.5 min), and a 16-question FAQ targeting B2B manufacturing buyers. Structured data throughout for SEO and LLM indexing.

Funkcjonalności
  • 3-model catalog with full specs and side-by-side comparison
  • ROI framing with real production data benchmarked against TIG/MIG
  • 16-question FAQ: model selection, costs, materials, infrastructure
  • 6 application use cases with target industries
  • Structured data for SEO and LLM discoverability
Tech Stack
ReactTypeScriptVercel
Live site
WP
Willa w Parku
Website · Venue / Hospitality
Opis

Website for a club-café in Łódź's Poniatowski Park. Specialty coffee by day, techno & house by night. Events, space rental, bar. Built in Lovable with local SEO and schema markup.

Funkcjonalności
  • Dual identity: café by day, club by night - one seamless site
  • Events page with calendar view and space rental form
  • Coffee, cocktails and food menu
  • Local SEO - schema markup (CafeOrCoffeeShop), OpenGraph, geo tags
  • Mobile-first responsive design

Akademia AI
Education · SaaS
Description

Audio course platform with full payment and certification flow. Covers AI tools, growth marketing and automation workflows - built for professionals who prefer audio over video.

Features
  • Audio-first course format - listen anywhere, no video required
  • Certificate issued on completion - shareable proof of skills
  • Stripe payments + Supabase auth - per-course access control
  • Vercel serverless API routes - no separate backend needed

RL
Relora
B2B SaaS · Relationship CRM
Description

B2B relationship intelligence platform - contact graph, CRM Kanban, outreach composer and deal alerts in one workspace. Built for founders and GTM teams who manage relationships across multiple accounts.

Features
  • Relationship graph - visualise connections between contacts, companies and deals
  • CRM Kanban - drag-and-drop pipeline with deal stages and follow-up reminders
  • Outreach Composer - personalised emails sent via Resend directly from the CRM
  • Deal alerts - automated notifications on inactivity and stage changes
Tech Stack
Next.jsTypeScriptSupabaseResendTailwindVercel
Live app
AS
Ads Assistant
B2B SaaS · Performance Marketing
Description

Google Ads management dashboard for performance marketers running multi-client accounts. Centralises campaigns, reports and ICP lead scoring - replacing fragmented agency tools.

Features
  • Multi-account dashboard - all client campaigns in one view
  • ICP lead scoring - qualify traffic quality directly from campaign data
  • Performance reports - ROAS, CPL, CTR across accounts and periods
  • Demo mode with realistic mock data - shareable without live API keys
Tech Stack
ReactTypeScriptViteTailwindVercel
Live app

  • Interactive product mockup with sidebar navigation
  • Early access waitlist with Supabase backend

Journey

From marketing to product

Apps I shipped and tools I picked up along the way.

2026
🚀 Brand Brain 24 + Relora Shipped
AI-native SaaS - brand intelligence with automated briefs and B2B relationship graph CRM.
ReactSupabaseAnthropicOpenAIVercel
🚀 Wycinarki + Spawarki Laserowe Shipped
SEO-first B2B product sites - structured data, LLM discoverability, each built in under 2h.
ReactVercelClaude
🚀 NotchCue Shipped
Native macOS teleprompter placing private notes under the MacBook camera notch. Swift, AppKit, local-first, custom DMG build pipeline.
SwiftAppKitAVFoundationmacOS 14+
Agentic workflows AI
Claude Code + MCP + custom tools. Code written, tested and deployed with agent assistance.
2025
🚀 HireMe + Akademia AI Shipped
Recruitment tracker and audio course platform with certification - first consumer products with Stripe.
ReactSupabaseStripeVercel
🚀 SabiSzop + VeloLodz Shipped
Consumer apps with AI - smart shopping lists and a cycling community with AI assistant AREK.
ReactSupabaseOpenAIPWA
🚀 AN Projekt, Amoree, Ciryam, Willa w Parku Shipped
Client sites - interior design studio, wedding hub, rock band, club-café. Zero to deployed fast.
ReactLovableVercel
Claude Code + Lovable / Base44 AI Dev
AI-assisted development as the default. Client MVP in 1 day, complex features in hours.
shadcn/ui + Resend Frontend
Components as code and transactional email. Design system + email in every new project.
2024
🚀 GrowthHub Shipped
First own SaaS dashboard - demand gen, lead scoring and revenue tracking for Kadromierz.
ReactSupabaseGA4Netlify
🚀 Działkometr Shipped
Plot value calculator with location analysis, utilities and property valuation in one view.
ReactSupabaseMapboxVercel
🚀 Ads Assistant Shipped
Multi-account Google Ads dashboard with AI ICP scoring, ROAS tracking and creative fatigue alerts.
ReactFastAPIBigQueryCloud RunOpenAI
FastAPI + BigQuery + Cloud Run Backend
Custom backend beyond Supabase. Containerisation, analytics at scale, IAM management.
Stripe Payments
First payments in a product. Webhooks, Customer Portal, PCI compliance from the start.
2023
First internal tools Start
Google Ads at scale, analytics and dashboards at Kadromierz. The itch to build proper tools started here.
React + Vite + TypeScript Frontend
First JS framework. No courses - straight to building.
Supabase Backend
Database and auth without managing a server. Postgres + RLS from day one.
